before_code:
def mk2 (a b : ℕ+) : Fin 2 → ℕ+ := ![a, b]
def sigma1 (m : ℕ+) : ℕ := ...
description: VERY IMPORTANT: Avoid custom definitions where possible. Every def must be strongly justified and come with good API. Avoid small basic defs like sigma1 (use ArithmeticFunction.sigma) and mk2 (use ![a,b]). No custom notation when mathlib has one. Before creating ANY def, search mathlib exhaustively.

Each lemma/theorem must be separated by exactly one blank line. Fix ALL linter warnings: line length (100 char max), unused variables/hypotheses (prefix with _), unused simp args (remove from simp call). These are not optional.

before_code:
set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000 in
private lemma foo : ... := by ...
after_code:
private lemma foo : ... := by
  -- break proof into helpers or pass typeclass args explicitly
description: maxHeartbeats options MUST be removed. Either break the proof into smaller helpers so each fits in default heartbeats, or if the issue is typeclass inference, pass arguments explicitly to avoid search. set_option maxHeartbeats is never acceptable.
